title: Orbital Debris Cleanup: Sweeper Drone Dispersion
strategies: row baseline: N equal disks in a single line across the sector (reproduces the checker baseline)
aligned square grid of equal disks with radius S/(2*ceil(sqrt(N)))
hexagonal (offset-row) packing with the largest equal radius that still fits N disks
boundary-aware unequal packing: enlarge corner/edge disks and fill interstices near the densest-known N-circle packings
